outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/programs/t_ae_overview.R
+++ b/programs/t_ae_overview.R
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
 adae <- read_xpt("./data/adam/adae.xpt")
 
 # Filter to safety population
-adsl_saf <- adsl %>% filter(ITTFL == "Y")
+adsl_saf <- adsl %>% filter(SAFFL == "Y")
 adae_saf <- adae %>% filter(SAFFL == "Y")
 
 # Get treatment groups
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@
   summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
 
 # Count subjects with at least one TEAE
-teae_subj <- adae_saf %>%
+teae_subj <- adae_saf %>% filter(TRTEMFL == "Y") %>%
   group_by(TRTAN) %>%
   summarise(n = n_distinct(USUBJID), .groups = "drop")
 
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@
 
 # Count total number of TEAEs
 teae_events <- adae_saf %>% filter(TRTEMFL == "Y") %>%
-  group_by(TRTAN) %>%
+  group_by(TRTAN, USUBJID, AESEQ) %>% slice(1) %>% ungroup() %>% group_by(TRTAN) %>%
   summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
 
 # Count subjects with serious AEs
